title: RDP keeps disconnecting from Google VM machine.
author: AviBy
body_snippet:
when connecting to the vm with the rdp client downloaded from gcp all is well.
When connecting via MRemoteNG it keeps disconnecting and connecting again after several seconds.
What is the issue?

iterations.description: Issue reports RDP disconnections specific to Google Cloud VMs with no reproducible steps, logs, or confirmation that the problem exists in recent builds.

comments.author: AviBy
comments.snippet: I would really appreciate any help regarding the above problem.

comments.snippet: hello, what version you are using?

comments.author: simonai1254
comments.snippet:
> when connecting to the vm with the rdp client downloaded from gcp all is well. When connecting via MRemoteNG it keeps disconnecting and connecting again after several seconds. What is the issue?

Have you tried using the Windows Built-in RDP utility? How does that behave? 
In case it behaves differently, what RDP version is defined in the mRemoteNG settings?

comments.author: AviBy
comments.snippet:
thanks
with windows rdp manager it 100% ok
I am using the nightly vetsion
but the stable one behaves the same.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `6c110776` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** RDP keeps disconnecting from Google VM machine.

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

notes:
AI triage (claude): Issue reports RDP disconnections specific to Google Cloud VMs with no reproducible steps, logs, or confirmation that the problem exists in recent builds.
Approach: Request reproduction steps, mRemoteNG version, GCP VM config, and RDP logs before any code investigation
